data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies choices to enhance user experience.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design focuses on ease of clicking and finger targets on mobile.
data.technical_spec: Optimized touch interface and button sizing

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Focuses on creating a visually organized UI.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items to simplify navigation.
data.technical_spec: Smart grouping of chat lists and options

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Prioritizes aesthetic design to enhance perceived usability.
